Security Engineer — 6 years

Application Security:
• Penetration testing — web application, API, and mobile assessments (OWASP Top 10, PTES methodology)
• Vulnerability assessment — SAST (Semgrep, CodeQL), DAST (OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite), SCA (Snyk, Dependabot)
• Threat modeling — STRIDE, PASTA frameworks applied during secure SDLC design reviews
• Secure code review — Python, Go, TypeScript — authentication, authorization, injection, cryptography bugs

Identity & Cryptography:
• OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML — implementation review and architecture design
• Cryptography — TLS/PKI certificate lifecycle, symmetric/asymmetric key management
• Secrets management — HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager integration and rotation policies

Operations & Compliance:
• SIEM — Splunk, AWS Security Hub — threat detection rules, alert triage, incident response
• Forensics — log analysis, memory forensics, chain-of-custody documentation
• Compliance — SOC2 Type II, ISO27001 audit preparation and control mapping
• DevSecOps — security gates in CI/CD, GuardDuty, Config Rules, drift detection
